title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are up to date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is out of date
scenario: Language change and DFU should complete successfully when earbuds are on latest firmware but smart charge case is on outdated firmware on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) to open Device Settings.
3. Ensure the earbuds/headset are on the latest firmware version.
4. Ensure the smart charge case/stand is on an outdated firmware version.
5. In Device Settings, tap on 'Language' and select a different language.
6. Confirm the language change and allow the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to proceed.
7. Wait for the update to complete on all components (earbuds/headset and charge case/stand).
8. Verify that both the earbuds/headset and the smart charge case/stand are now on the latest firmware version.
9. Check the language displayed on the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) to confirm it reflects the newly selected language.
expected: The language change and DFU complete successfully. Both the earbuds/headset and the smart charge case/stand are updated to the latest firmware. The language on the smart charge case changes to the newly selected language.
